title: Das Märchen von der Prinzessin, die unbedingt in einem Märchen vorkommen wollte
original_title: Das Märchen von der Prinzessin, die unbedingt in einem Märchen vorkommen wollte
overview: Princess Clara has a big problem. She lives in a kingdom that is so small that it doesn't appear in any fairy tales. But Clara would love to play Sleeping Beauty or Snow White in her own fairy tale. And so she sets off on an adventurous journey with her best friend, the court jester Michel, which will hopefully end with her own fairy tale.
